expectations.text: generate-output-exists: generate.mjs api-hook 실행 결과로 생성된 보일러플레이트 파일이 존재한다
expectations.evidence: Summary does not mention running generate.mjs. Files were created manually. Output files are in the without_skill/outputs/ directory, not generated via a script.
File exists at without_skill/outputs/useFetchOrder.ts with a full useFetchOrder hook implementation.

expectations.text: hook-in-queries: 훅 파일이 apis/queries/ 경로 하위에 배치된다
expectations.evidence: The file is at without_skill/outputs/useFetchOrder.ts (flat output directory). It was not placed in an apis/queries/ subdirectory structure, nor was it placed in the actual project at hooks/apis/queries/.
No index.ts file exists in the without_skill outputs. The hook is exported directly from useFetchOrder.ts but not re-exported from any index file.

expectations.text: returns-loading: 훅 반환값에 loading/isLoading 상태가 포함된다
expectations.evidence: without_skill useFetchOrder.ts returns { data, isLoading, isError, error, refetch } - isLoading is included.

expectations.text: returns-error: 훅 반환값에 error 상태가 포함된다
expectations.evidence: without_skill useFetchOrder.ts returns error: Error | null and isError: boolean in UseFetchOrderResult interface.

expectations.text: test-file-exists: useFetchOrder에 대한 테스트 파일이 존재한다
expectations.evidence: File exists at without_skill/outputs/useFetchOrder.test.ts with 5 test cases using Jest and React Testing Library.
